behavior_in_task_description.reason: All file paths, method signatures, and class references in tests are explicitly named in instruction.md.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction.md spells out the exact fix: the new method signature, @Deprecated annotation, delegation pattern 'Read.class', and specific caller updates like 'Read.resourceAsString(CdpEventTypes.class, ...)' and 'resourceOwner.getResourceAsStream(resource)'.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check for reasonable patterns (method signature with Class<?>, @Deprecated, delegation to Read.class) that any correct implementation following the stated API would match.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: All tests use regex pattern matching on file contents (e.g., re.search on read_text()) with no code execution or compilation.

test_not_tautological.reason: Each f2p test requires specific structural changes that a stub cannot satisfy; the file contents must actually contain the new method signatures and caller updates.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover the new method signature, deprecation, delegation, and all four caller updates listed in the instruction.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with comment headers (FAIL_TO_PASS, PASS_TO_PASS) and have descriptive names and docstrings.

no_typos.reason: Filenames and paths are consistent and correct.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction.md explicitly names exact files, method signatures, and the precise code transformation (e.g., 'must delegate to the new two-argument method, passing the defining class (Read.class)').
